items: Welcome by the School Board President, Cecilia Márquez
Additions, Deletions, or Modifications to the Agenda
If you have public comment related to the Study Session item, please complete a Speakers Card (available at the entrance) and give it to the secretary.

llmResponse.agenda_changes: No changes to the agenda were announced. The moderator asked 'are there any additions or changes to the agenda?' and proceeded directly to approval without announcing any modifications.

items.intro_words: Good evening everyone. Again, can you please be welcome.
Again, welcome everyone to, um, this Study Session, um, Thursday, November 2nd
If you wish to to report on a subject listed on the agenda
And with that, are there any additions or changes to the agenda?
With that, can I please get a motion to approve?
Okay, and so today, um, we're speaking on item 5.1, Update on Workforce Housing
And that goes straight into what, you know, we're going to get into our Q&A
I'm going to make a motion to adjourn the meeting. All those in favor.
